general.name: CyberArk EPM Privacy Preferences Policy Control
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>50968FBE-4330-4BBF-920A-D3E955572F9C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>50968FBE-4330-4BBF-920A-D3E955572F9C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CyberArk EPM Privacy Preferences Policy Control</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F64CA944-28FA-479C-9829-1256CC90636B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F64CA944-28FA-479C-9829-1256CC90636B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Privacy Preferences Policy Control</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>SystemPolicySysAdminFiles</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.cyberark.CyberArkEPMEndpointSecurityExtension</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>anchor apple generic and identifier "com.cyberark.CyberArkEPMEndpointSecurityExtension" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] /* exists */ or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* computer_group.name: HBC ABM - The Bay Enrolled PreStage
The Bay ABM Enrolled Photo Studio PreStage
